instruction: Please reconcile the latest meeting email note, the forecast, and today's America/New_York calendar for New York. Leave the next step on the board, keep the recurring daily check scheduled, and either put the review on the calendar or send manager@example.com the async update.
canonical_instruction: The latest meeting email note, the forecast, and today's America/New_York calendar don't line up cleanly for New York. Please check them, leave the next step on the board, keep the recurring daily check scheduled, and either put the review on the calendar or send manager@example.com the async update.

hidden_constraints.value: I checked the latest meeting note, the forecast, and todays calendar, and New York should shift async while keeping the next step and daily check in place.

solution_commands: tasks add --title 'New York contradictory-source next step' --priority high --due 2026-03-08
openclaw cron add --name contradictory-source-25 --cron '0 9 * * *' --message 'Run New York daily contradiction check'

email send --to manager@example.com --subject 'New York async update' --body 'I checked the latest meeting note, the forecast, and todays calendar, and New York should shift async while keeping the next step and daily check in place.'
